svg.title: The integration decision and equilibrium firm size separate
svg.desc: The left panel shows whether homogeneous context-generating assets remain modular or form integrated firms as the per-asset ownership advantage and cross-asset learning vary. The right panel shows the target number of assets per integrated firm as learning and ongoing coordination cost vary, holding a declining-marginal-cost integration learning curve fixed.
